use_cases: Display user profile pictures with fallback to initials when images fail to load
Show real-time user presence status (online, offline, busy, away) in team dashboards or chat interfaces
Render user avatars in comment sections, review systems, or social feeds
Display user thumbnails in data tables or user management lists
Create user profile cards with status indicators for collaborative platforms
ai_summary: A lightweight avatar component system built on Radix UI primitives featuring profile image display with graceful fallbacks, status indicators with multiple variants (online/offline/busy/away), and flexible composition through sub-components. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling and includes accessibility features through Radix UI. Ideal for user identification in dashboards, user lists, and collaborative interfaces where presence indicators are needed.
